sentences.arabic: بَعْضُ النَّاسِ يُفَضِّلُ الطَّعَامَ الْمَنْزِلِيَّ عَلَى الطَّعَامِ فِي الْمَطَاعِمِ.
sentences.translation: Neki ljudi više vole domaću hranu od restoranskog jela.
sentences.translationEn: Some people prefer home food to eating at restaurants.

sentences.arabic: أَنَا مِنْ هَؤُلَاءِ الَّذِينَ يُحِبُّونَ الطَّعَامَ الَّذِي يُطْبَخُ فِي الْبَيْتِ.
sentences.translation: Ja sam jedan od onih koji vole hranu kuhanu kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: I am one of those who like food cooked at home.

sentences.arabic: الطَّعَامُ الْمَنْزِلِيُّ أَكْثَرُ صِحِّيَّةً وَطَعْمُهُ أَلَذُّ.
sentences.translation: Domaća hrana je zdravija i ukusnija.
sentences.translationEn: Home food is healthier and tastier.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَطْبُخَ مَعَ عَائِلَتِي فِي الْعُطْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Volim kuhati s porodicom tokom odmora.
sentences.translationEn: I like to cook with my family during the holiday.
